channel.title: GitHub EJS Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of EJS in GitHub

item.title: Ovi/DummyJSON
item.description: DummyJSON.com provides different types of REST Endpoints filled with JSON data which you can use in developing the frontend with your favorite framework and library without worrying about writing a backend.

item.title: Fechin/reference
item.description: ⭕ Share quick reference cheat sheet for developers.
